title: Drop artifact-store (kind + Fitting + routes); documents self-contained; shared markdown renderer

implement.detail: Removed the artifact-store capability KIND (types.ts) + faculty alias (metadata.ts), the Fitting (fittings/seed/artifact-store), its 2 routes, registry views, sidebar icons, library entry, browser-automation residue. Repurposed src/lib/artifact-store.ts -> document-store.ts (resolves the documents store; legacy storage_root fallback). documents now self-contained: vendors its OWN artifacts.py (resolved via __file__), setup.sh uses it, routes import document-store. Rewired consumers off the kind: documents/coding-subagent/improver-nightly. NEW src/lib/markdown.ts shared safe renderer (garrison://->/fitting, http target/noopener, unsafe schemes dropped, HTML escaped). improver emits file:// not dead garrison://artifacts. Removed artifact-store from compositions/{default,router-v4,dogfood-orch} + 2 lockfiles.

test.detail: FULL suite 1366 passed; only 2 parked-WIP fails remain (gemini-runtime, orchestrator-placement — outside blast radius, evidence stash@{1}). D2 FIXED 4 pre-existing baseline failures: web-channel-context x3 (shared markdown renderer) + fitting-files-api x1 (stale memory->basic-memory ref). typecheck + all composition YAML/lockfiles valid.

codexReview.detail: R1 (1 critical + 2 high + 1 medium): shipped compositions+lockfiles dangling artifact-store dep (apm install would fail) -> removed; documents setup.sh required deleted CLI -> vendored; document-store dropped legacy storage_root -> fallback added; improver dead garrison://artifacts links -> file://. R2: APPROVE, no remaining dangling dep.
